name: Corn Bread Loaf
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Grease a 9-by-5-inch loaf pan.
3. Dust the bottom of the pan with cornmeal and shake off excess.
4. In a large bowl, mix together flour, cornmeal, sugar, baking powder, baking soda, and salt.
5. In a medium bowl, whisk eggs, oil, milk, and buttermilk until combined.
6. Add the egg mixture and corn to the dry ingredients and stir just until combined.
7. Pour the batter into the prepared pan.
8. Bake for 15 minutes at 350°F.
9. Reduce temperature to 325°F and continue baking until a tester inserted into the center comes out clean, about 1 hour.
10. Cool the bread in the pan on a rack for 30 minutes.
11. Turn the bread out onto a rack. Serve warm or at room temperature. (Can be prepared up to 1 day ahead. Cover tightly and store at room temperature.)
